visual_description: A man in a light blue shirt and striped tie sits in a black office chair, looking down with a serious expression. The camera slowly zooms out, revealing a wider view of a modern office or command center. Several other men, some in police uniforms and others in civilian clothes, are seated around a large, dark conference table, while another man in a white shirt and tie stands at the head of the table, observing them.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in Mandarin Chinese in a formal, narrative tone, as if reading a report or making an announcement.
